/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -fPIC -g -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,liblightning__rosidl_generator_c.so -o liblightning__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/lightning__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/lightning/srv/detail/loc_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/lightning__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/lightning/srv/detail/save_map__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
